title: solidago nemoralis subsp. nemoralis
intro: Solidago nemoralis subsp. nemoralis, also known as Gray's goldenrod, is a subspecies of perennial plant in the Asteraceae family native to eastern North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Solidago nemoralis subsp. nemoralis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
